name: text_search
behavior: [READ] Resolves free-text names (e.g., 'Monash University') into structured IDs and coordinates using the offline database.

name: place_details
behavior: [READ] Fetches granular metadata (hours, accessibility, amenities, reviews) for a specific location to support policy-based logic.

name: nearby_search
behavior: [READ] Discovers points of interest within a spatial radius from a center point using offline distance calculations.

name: compute_routes
behavior: [READ] Retrieves actual paths (polylines) and transit metrics by looking up pre-cached routes in the benchmark database.

name: search_along_route
behavior: [READ] Identifies services or brands that fall within a defined travel path to minimize detour time based on a specific polyline.

name: read_place_website
behavior: [READ] Extracts Markdown content (Menus, FAQs) from a place's official website via the cached database to avoid hallucinated URLs.

name: check_availability
behavior: [READ] Checks the simulated environment state to determine if a location has enough capacity for a specific date and time.

name: book_place
behavior: [WRITE] Mutates the environment state by confirming a reservation and deducting available slots from the database.

name: get_transit_schedule
behavior: [READ] Retrieves the departure schedule (route numbers, destinations, times) for a specific public transit stop from the city's transport database.

name: search_venue_events
behavior: [READ] Searches a venue's official website calendar for events, exhibitions, or shows happening on a specific date.

name: submit_council_report
behavior: [WRITE] Submits a maintenance report (e.g., pothole, lighting) to the local City Council web portal. Automatically extracts exact coordinates from the place_id.

name: transfer_to_human_agents
behavior: [WRITE] Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue.
